description: Synthetic beings and alien archetypes in sci-fi settings.
characters: A human-shaped machine struggling with questions of consciousness.
A being enhanced with mechanical parts, neither fully human nor machine.
A mechanical servant built for a purpose, sometimes outgrowing it.
A genetic copy searching for identity beyond their original.
An extraterrestrial diplomat bridging the gap between species.
A many-limbed alien with compound eyes and a hive mind.
A cold-blooded alien with ancient patience and sharp senses.
A mind-reading being who hears thoughts whether they want to or not.
A feeling-sensitive being who absorbs the emotions of those nearby.
